title: ARCHES DAY CENTER - 211info
text: ARCHES PROJECT ARCHES DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day center with services including showers, laundry, hygiene kits, meals, mailboxes, and resource navigation. 615 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Homeless individuals and families Hours: Day center and meals: Wednesday-Sunday 9am-4pm, breakfast 9am-10am, lunch noon-1pm Mail pick up: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm and 2pm-4pm Email (503) 399-9080 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 399-9080 Main phone (533) 399-9118 FAX Main phone (503) 399-9080 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days a week 8:30am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots Bus Lines 3,17,and 20. North of Marion Square Park and East of the Wallace Marine walking bridge. Services: Community Meals * Homelessness Issues Homeless Drop In Centers Pet Food * Homelessness Issues Public Showers/Baths * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Temporary Mailing Address * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARCHES PROJECT
